data.title: Bitcoin Faces Potential Downward Pressure Amid CME Gap Concerns
data.description:
On April 16, renowned trader Killa (@KillaXBT) highlighted a significant CME gap near $84,000 for Bitcoin, which he believes could lead to a sharp decline. According to BlockBeats, this gap is reminiscent of two similar gaps from 2022, which took 290 and over 500 days to close.

Killa suggests that the current Bitcoin trend closely mirrors the 2022 pattern, indicating that the $84,000 gap may not be filled in the short term. He warns traders that the anticipated local top might be closer than the widely expected $80,000 target, suggesting potential downward pressure rather than a swift rebound.

Recently, Killa announced that he has shorted Bitcoin at $74,688, with a stop-loss set at $80,000.

As a quantitative trader focused on BTC, Killa had previously predicted the peak of the current bull market in May 2025 and has amassed over 180,000 followers on the X platform.

data.title: South Korea to Discuss Digital Assets Legislation Post-Elections
data.description: South Korea's ruling Democratic Party is set to initiate comprehensive discussions on a foundational law concerning digital assets following the local elections on June 3. According to NS3.AI, a party task force reviewed the legislative direction of the bill during a subcommittee meeting on March 27. The party is also working with lawmakers Kang Jun-hyeon and Kang Min-guk to include the bill in the legislative agenda.

data.title: Iran's Political Shift Raises Concerns Over Strait of Hormuz Stability
data.description: Iran has adopted a more confrontational political approach following recent conflicts, according to NS3.AI. This shift diminishes the likelihood of negotiated solutions and has led to increased tensions in the Strait of Hormuz. The disruption in this critical waterway is being used as a pressure tactic, which could heighten volatility in global energy markets and exacerbate regional instability.

data.title: Bank of Korea Nominee Supports Stablecoin Coexistence
data.description: The Democratic Party's Digital Asset Task Force has expressed support for Bank of Korea governor nominee Shin Hyun-song's recent remarks on stablecoins. According to NS3.AI, Shin indicated that stablecoins denominated in the Korean won could coexist alongside other currencies. This marks a shift from his earlier critical stance on the matter. The task force emphasized that the discussion should now focus on ensuring a safe design and establishing a legal framework for stablecoins, rather than debating their necessity. Shin's comments were made during a confirmation hearing held yesterday.

data.title: Bio Protocol's BIO Token Surges Over 100% in Short Timeframe
data.description: Bio Protocol's BIO token experienced a significant increase, rising 102.65% to reach $0.03995 in a brief period. According to NS3.AI, CoinMarketCap data indicated that this movement propelled BIO's value by more than 100%, marking a notable surge in its market performance.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 75,000 USDT with a 1.02% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 16, 2026, 03:38 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 75,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 75,005.226563 USDT, with a narrowed 1.02% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: TRB broke through $19.38, rising more than 23% on the day.
data.description: OKX market data shows that TRB briefly surged above $19.38, currently trading at $19.26, with a daily increase of over 23%.

data.title: Trump: Israeli and Lebanese leaders will meet tomorrow for negotiations
data.description: Trump confirmed in a post on his Truth platform, "Trying to buy some breathing room between Israel and Lebanon. The two leaders haven't spoken in a long time, about 34 years. This will happen tomorrow."

data.title: MSX Reflects on Achievements and Lessons Over the Past Year
data.description: Over the past year, MSX has made significant strides in its operations and growth. According to PANews, the company has not only achieved notable milestones but also gained valuable insights that bolster its confidence for future endeavors. The past 365 days have been a period of reflection and learning for MSX, as it navigated various challenges and opportunities. Looking ahead, the company is optimistic about its trajectory and is poised to leverage its experiences to drive further success.

data.title: Evolution of Trading Mechanisms Sparks Bull Markets
data.description: The initiation of each bull market is driven not by new narratives but by advancements in trading mechanisms. According to PANews, these developments in trading systems play a crucial role in the onset of significant market upswings, highlighting the importance of technological and procedural innovations in the financial sector.

data.title: Dystopian Era Seen as Necessary Step Towards Utopia
data.description: A recent statement highlights the belief that experiencing a dystopian period is essential to achieving a utopian future. According to PANews, this perspective suggests that societal challenges and hardships may pave the way for a more ideal world. The notion emphasizes the transformative potential of overcoming adversity to reach a state of improved societal conditions.

data.title: AI's Current Relationship with Web3 and Stablecoins as Payment Layer
data.description: AI TRENDS | The integration of artificial intelligence with Web3 technologies is currently limited, as experts acknowledge that AI does not yet require Web3 infrastructure. According to PANews, while AI's need for Web3 is minimal at present, stablecoins have emerged as a native payment layer for AI agents. This development highlights the evolving role of stablecoins in facilitating transactions within AI ecosystems. The use of stablecoins offers a streamlined and efficient method for AI agents to conduct payments, underscoring their importance in the digital economy. As AI continues to advance, the relationship between these technologies may evolve, potentially leading to more integrated solutions in the future.

data.description: Zora (ZORA) is set to unlock approximately 16.667 million tokens on April 23 at 21:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is part of the scheduled unlocks tracked by the Web3 asset data platform, RootData.

data.description: SOON tokens are set to be unlocked on April 23 at 13:00 UTC+8, according to ChainCatcher. The Web3 asset data platform RootData reports that approximately 21.88 million SOON tokens will be released. This development is part of the token's scheduled unlocking process.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Hong Kong AI Application Stocks Surge
data.description: Hong Kong's AI application sector experienced significant gains, with several companies seeing notable increases in their stock prices. According to Jin10, DeepTech (01384.HK) led the surge with a rise of over 21%, followed by MyForth (02556.HK) which climbed more than 13%. Pony.ai-W (02026.HK) also saw a substantial increase, rising over 10%. Additionally, Kingdee International (00268.HK) and Baidu (09888.HK) both experienced gains, with their stocks rising by 6.8%.

data.title: Aster CEO Discusses Key Strategies for Success in Perpetual DEX Market
data.description:
Foresight News posted on X (formerly Twitter). Aster CEO Leonard shared insights on how the company quickly rose to prominence in the competitive perpetual decentralized exchange (DEX) market. In a discussion with Joe Zhou, Leonard highlighted two core strategies: a strong focus on risk management and a rapid trial-and-error approach.

Leonard emphasized the importance of risk management, noting that the team’s background in centralized exchanges has instilled a natural emphasis on controlling risks. He stated that while choosing the right market is crucial, survival is even more important, as each market cycle brings new opportunities.

The second strategy involves a rapid trial-and-error mechanism. Leonard explained that many perpetual DEXs aim to perfect their products before launching, but Aster prioritizes quick delivery to gather market feedback. He believes that the market is unpredictable, and it is better to release products early and let the market provide insights. This approach allows users to express their preferences and lets prices reflect the product's value.

Leonard also mentioned that while the public often sees Aster's successful ventures, there are many attempts that do not succeed. The company conducts numerous small-scale experiments without jeopardizing cash flow or taking on systemic risks. He concluded that in the field of innovation, a success rate of 10% to 20% is considered high, and continuous experimentation is essential for long-term success.

data.title: The first project in Gate.com's pre-IPO series, SpaceX (SPCX), is about to open for subscription, with an implied valuation of $1.4 trillion.
data.description: Gate.com will launch its first Pre-IPO project, SpaceX (SPCX). The subscription period is from 18:00 on April 20, 2026 to 18:00 on April 22, 2026 (UTC+8), with a total subscription amount of 33,900 SPCX at a price of $590 each, a total value of approximately $20.001 million, and an implied valuation of $1.4 trillion. This SpaceX (SPCX) offering supports subscriptions in USDT and GUSD, with a minimum participation threshold of only 100 USDT and no transaction fees or profit sharing. After subscription, SPCX asset certificates are expected to be distributed by 18:00 on May 6 (UTC+8) and will be 100% unlocked for pre-market trading on the platform. In addition, Gate is launching an airdrop incentive program for high-level users and super agents, running from 18:00 on April 15, 2026 to 18:00 on April 22, 2026 (UTC+8). Eligible users can receive SPCX asset certificates for free.

data.title: Bitget has added contracts for popular stocks such as AMD and SanDisk SNDK, supporting leverage up to 20x.
data.description: According to an official announcement, to meet market demand for trading in US AI-related stocks, Bitget stock contracts now offer six popular options: AMD (Advanced Micro Devices), AMAT (Applied Materials), SNDK (SanDisk), STX (Seagate Technology), LITE (Lumentum), and FLY (Firefly Aerospace), covering chips, semiconductor equipment, and memory. These contracts support leverage up to 20x. For more details, please refer to the Bitget official platform.

data.title: Anthropic restricts the release of the Mythos model, citing national security risks.
data.description: Anthropic has decided to restrict the public release of its Mythos model due to its highly automated cyberattack capabilities. Reports indicate that the model, in internal testing, could independently complete the vulnerability discovery and exploitation process and generate multi-step attack schemes. Sources familiar with the matter stated that in early testing, Mythos could autonomously build intrusion tools targeting Linux systems and, under guidance, complete complex vulnerability chain attacks. These capabilities were assessed as potentially posing a risk to global infrastructure. Anthropic management ultimately positioned Mythos as a cyber defense tool and granted it limited testing access to select organizations. Industry insiders point out that similar models may significantly improve the efficiency of cyber attack and defense, but they may also introduce new security challenges. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Binance Launches Simple Earn Promotion for Balkan Users
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a new promotion on Simple Earn Flexible Products is now available for eligible users in the Balkans region. This initiative allows users to subscribe to USDT Flexible Products and benefit from an exclusive 15% Bonus Tiered Annual Percentage Rate (APR) rewards for a period of seven days. The promotion runs from 2026-04-16 11:00 (UTC) to 2026-05-15 23:59 (UTC).

Eligibility for this offer is limited to users from the Balkan countries, specifically Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, North Macedonia, Montenegro, Kosovo, and Serbia, who do not have any active subscriptions to Simple Earn Flexible or Locked Products across all tokens prior to 2026-04-16 11:00 (UTC). Newly registered users may experience a delay of up to 48 hours before they can view and subscribe to the offer. The subscription is capped at a maximum of seven days and is available on a first-come, first-served basis.

The reward structure includes a Bonus Tiered APR, which is distributed daily to users' Spot Accounts, starting the day after accrual begins. Real-Time APR is accrued and directly accumulated in users' Earn Accounts every minute. The Bonus Tiered APR rewards commence accruing the day after subscription, based on a daily snapshot of subscribed amounts. These rewards are distributed the following day between 00:00 (UTC) and 08:00 (UTC).

Users must complete identity verification during the promotion period to qualify for rewards, and only master accounts are eligible for the Bonus Tiered APR. Sub-accounts do not qualify. The promotion is not associated with the issuer of USDT, and rewards are distributed from Binance's own funds, based on market conditions. Binance reserves the right to amend the terms and conditions of the promotion at any time.
